Brand Ambassador Application Form Template

Please enable JavaScript in your browser to complete this form.

Clear Signature
pro
This template includes features available in WPForms Pro. Compare Plans

The Brand Ambassador Application Form Template by WPForms is the perfect solution for effortlessly recruiting and onboarding your brand’s representatives to help garner more attention and, eventually, more business.

How Does the Brand Ambassador Application Form Template Work?

To ensure smooth operation, the Brand Ambassador Application Form Template is designed to work seamlessly with the WPForms Pro License, alongside the handy Signature Addon. Below is a brief description of the fields included:

  • Personal Information:
    • Full Name: Collects the applicant’s complete name, adding a personal touch to each application.
    • Date of Birth: Useful for understanding the demographic profile of your applicants.
    • Phone Number: A direct line for quick and efficient communication.
    • Email Address: Essential for sending detailed information and updates about the ambassador program.
  • Professional Background:
    • Current Occupation/Job Title: Provides insight into the applicant’s professional background and skills.
    • Company/Organization: Helps to understand the applicant’s current affiliations and industry.
    • Years of Experience in Related Field: Assesses the level of expertise and relevance to your brand.
  • Social Media Presence:
    • Instagram Handle: A key platform for social media influence and reach.
    • Number of Followers: Measures the potential impact and audience reach of the applicant.
    • Other Social Media Platforms and Handles: Explores the applicant’s presence on various social media channels.
    • Average Engagement Rate (if known): Offers a glimpse into how well the applicant interacts with their audience.
    • Previous Brand Ambassador Roles: Indicates the applicant’s experience and familiarity with such roles.
    • Details of Previous Experience: Delivers insights into past collaborations and the nature of the applicant’s engagement.
  • Interest and Motivation:
    • Why Do You Want to Become a Brand Ambassador for [Brand Name]?: Reveals the applicant’s motivation and alignment with your brand’s values and goals.
    • How Do You Think You Can Contribute to Our Brand?: Allows the applicant to express their unique approach to promoting and representing your brand.
  • Availability and Commitment:
    • Hours Available Per Week: Assesses the applicant’s availability and commitment level to the ambassador role.
    • Preferred Duration of Ambassadorship: Helps plan long-term strategies and collaborations with potential ambassadors.
    • Consent to Terms and Conditions of Ambassadorship: A necessary agreement to ensure mutual understanding.
    • Signature and Date: Facilitated by the Signature Addon, this field ensures a formal commitment from the applicant.

Sign up with WPForms today and access the Brand Ambassador Application Form Template. It’s perfect for businesses, influencers, and agencies aiming to forge meaningful brand relationships.

Get WPForms Pro

Here are some other Business Operations form templates

Register workshop attendees with session selection, accessibility needs, and a map showing venue locations.

Coordinate curbside pickups with appointment times, vehicle details, and a map showing customers where to park.

Test Drive Appointment Form

Process equipment rental reservations with pickup scheduling, equipment type selection, and a map of pickup locations.

Wedding RSVP Form

Collect wedding RSVPs, guest counts, meal choices, and dietary needs, plus show the venue location with an embedded interactive map.

Use Template View Demo

Gym Membership Signup Form

Use this template to allow new members to register, select a plan and add-ons, and confirm the correct gym location using an interactive map field.

Use Template View Demo

Our form templates let you create any kind of WordPress form in a few clicks.

You can select any template to view the demo and try it out. If it works for you, you can import it and publish it in minutes. Each WPForms template is fully customizable too. Our drag and drop form builder makes it easy to adapt any template to fits your business’ needs. When you use our form templates, you can easily:

  • Import Any Template With 1 Click

    Ready to get started? Import any form template and start customizing it right away.

  • Add or Remove Fields

    Use our simple drag and drop form builder to add fields, delete them, or move them around.

  • Customize Notification Settings

    It’s easy to edit the notification emails on any template with your own text or smart tags.

  • Change the Confirmation Message

    Easily display a custom message after submission – or forward your visitor to another page.

  • Change the Field Labels

    Click on a field and change the text to collect the exact information you need.

  • Change the Notification Email

    Add CCed recipients and multiple notifications so you never miss an entry.

  • Customize the Submit Button

    Adapt the words on the button and change the color so that it matches your theme.

  • Publish Your Form With Ease

    Hit publish — that's it! WPForms makes it easy to get your forms online without writing code.

  • Get Instant Form Insights

    Track form submissions with our built-in analytics to see how your forms perform.

WPForms makes it easy to publish forms on any post or page. You can also publish your forms in the WordPress sidebar or footer. And because we integrate with page builders, you can easily make an Elementor contact form, or publish any form on a landing page in SeedProd.
